titleStmt.title: SII 5.708: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 708. (A.R. No. 144 of 1895). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravatti koneriṉmaikoṇṭāṉ Uyyakkoṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyil patipātamūlap paṭṭuṭaip pañcācāriyat tevarkaṉmikkum śrīmākeśva rakkaṇkāṇi cevārkaḷukkum śrīkāriyañceyvāṉukkum
Ittevar melaittiruvitikku meṟkāka nattamāka koṇ(ṭ)ṭu Irumāvum tūyaperumāḷcaturve timaṅkalap perāl Eṟṟiṉa Akarattu brāhma ṇarkkum paṅkukkum paṭṭavirutti kiṭaipuṟam Uḷḷiṭṭaṉavaiyeṟṟukkum Uṭalāṉa nilattilum vāstu vum vāstu marivāRead ºparivā.
ramum kuḷamum koppiracāra pūmiyumāka Uḷḷiṭṭu ceyta nilattilum Ittevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyil AkappaṭiRead akappaṭa.nilattukku koyiṟkaṇakku Ātaṉuruṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi tevatāṉam Uḷḷūrkkaḷil nilam Oṉṟe Iraṇṭumāk kāṇiyum Etirilicoḻamaṅkalam nilam mukkāle Iraṇṭu mā
vum brahma teyam tirukkuṭamūkku Ūrkiḻ Iṟaiyili nilam patte Eṭṭumāvum yokiṉiyākeśva ra Iṟaiyili cuṅkamtavirttacoḻanalluril Iṟaiyili pirātti Uḷppaṭa tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka vilaikoṇṭa nilattu nilam Āṟumāvum Āka nilam paṉṉiraṇṭaraiye muṉṟu
māk kāṇikkum talaimāṟum Eṟṟamākavum Ittevarkku tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyumāka Iṭa coṉṉa nilattukku Innāṭṭu naṭārāṉa kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ karuppūril turokam ceytārai kāṇimāṟiṉa nilamum palarum kāṇiyāṉa nilattu vatta
rāyaṉ kāṇi nikki niṉṟa nilam Ivarkaḷaik kāṇimāṟi Innilam Uḷppaṭa nilam patiṉeḻaraiye nālumāk kāṇiyum patiṉeṭṭāvatu mutal Ittevarkku tirunāmattukkāṇiyum tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyumāy niṟkak kaṭavatāka peṟaveṇumeṉṟu kaḷappāḷarā
yaṉ namakku coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyyakkaṭavatāka colli kaṇakkilum Iṭṭukkoḷḷakkaṭavarkaḷāka varikku kūṟuceyvārkaḷukkum coṉṉom Iṉnilam patiṉeṭṭāvatumutal Ittevarkku tirunāmattukkaāṇiyum tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyumā
ka kaikkoḷka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira Olai miṉavaṉ muventaveḷāṉ Ivai kāṅkeyarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Ilaṅkeśva raṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cetikularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivaik kaliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cerikularāyaṉ Eḻuttu ḷ 2 100 3 10 9 ṉāl .. svasti śrī .
Digital edition of SII 5.708 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
